name: Silver City Nuggets
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and mix in the brown sugar and vanilla.
2. Mix in the remaining ingredients until well combined.
3. The mixture will be very crumbly. Spoon the mixture into muffin tins, filling each cup about 1/3 full with approximately 1 to 2 tablespoons of batter.
4. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes or until the mixture in the cups is brown and bubbling.
5. Remove from the oven and allow to cool in the tins for 15 minutes before popping the cookies out.
